description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the mono:latest Docker image with a global before_script that runs nuget restore -NonInteractive. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a debug job that runs msbuild /p:Configuration="Debug" /p:Platform="Any CPU" /p:OutputPath="./../../build/debug/" "MyProject.sln" and then executes mono packages/NUnit.ConsoleRunner.3.6.0/tools/nunit3-console.exe build/debug/MyProject.Test.dll. In the deploy stage add a release job that runs msbuild /p:Configuration="Release" /p:Platform="Any CPU" /p:OutputPath="./../../build/release/" "MyProject.sln", publishes the resulting build/release/MyProject.exe as an artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
